# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

imports:
- path: https://www.googleapis.com/clouddeploymentmanager/v2/repository/google/dm/deployment-manager/google/resource_manager.py
- path: https://www.googleapis.com/clouddeploymentmanager/v2/repository/google/dm/deployment-manager/google/cloudsql.py

resources:
- name: app-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false

- name: app-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    region: $(properties["region"])
    ipCidrRange: 10.10.0.0/24

- name: app-firewall-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "22"
    targetTags:
      - app-vm

- name: app-firewall-http
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - "80"
    targetTags:
      - app-vm

- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: e2-medium
      tags:
        items:
          - app-vm
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: $(ref.app-network.selfLink)
          subnetwork: $(ref.app-subnet.selfLink)
          accessConfigs:
            - name: External NAT
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      disks:
        - boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
      metadata:
        items:
          - key: startup-script
            value: |
              #!/bin/bash
              set -eux
              apt-get update
              apt-get install -y nginx
              systemctl enable nginx
              systemctl start nginx

- name: app-mig
  type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
  properties:
    baseInstanceName: app
    zone: $(properties["zone"])
    targetSize: 2
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)

- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.regionBackendService
  properties:
    region: $(properties["region"])
    protocol: HTTP
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    healthChecks:
      - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
      - group: $(ref.app-mig.instanceGroup)
        balancingMode: UTILIZATION
        capacityScaler: 1.0

- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.httpHealthCheck
  properties:
    port: 80
    requestPath: /

- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: app-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
    portRange: "80"

- name: app-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: $(env["deployment"])-app-bucket-$(properties["projectId"])
    location: $(properties["region"])
    storageClass: STANDARD

- name: app-cloudsql-ip-allow
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.firewall
  properties:
    kind: sql#aclEntry
    value: 0.0.0.0/0
    name: allow-all

- name: app-cloudsql
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    region: $(properties["region"])
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      availabilityType: ZONAL
      dataDiskSizeGb: 10
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
          - name: app-vm-range
            value: 10.10.0.0/24

- name: app-cloudsql-db
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.database
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.app-cloudsql.name)
    name: appdb

outputs:
- name: instanceGroup
  value: $(ref.app-mig.instanceGroup)
- name: loadBalancerIP
  value: $(ref.app-forwarding-rule.IPAddress)
- name: storageBucket
  value: $(ref.app-bucket.name)
- name: cloudSqlConnectionName
  value: $(ref.app-cloudsql.connectionName)
